name: Toil and Trouble body scrub
description: A bubbling, cauldron-inspired body scrub that sloughs away dead skin with a dark, spiced, and magical scent blend worthy of any witch's potion.
archive_note: A recurring Halloween Kitchen exclusive body scrub, inspired by the witches' chant from Shakespeare's Macbeth.
nostalgia_angle: Named after the famous Macbeth incantation, this Halloween Kitchen scrub is a fan-favourite seasonal treat.
throwback_reference: Inspired by the witches' spell in Shakespeare's Macbeth — 'Double, double toil and trouble; fire burn and cauldron bubble.'
